title: Battery Charger for Nikon COOLPIX S60, S80, S200, S202, S203, S210, S220, S225, S230, S500, S510, S520, S570, S600, S700, S3000, S4000, S5100 Camera - For EN-EL10 Battery
features: Versatile Charging Option: Common USB input and the ability to charge with a USB wall charger, car charger, or external battery gives you more options than a standard battery charger.
Replacement for Nikon Quick Charger MH-63 for EN-EL10 Battery.
100% Safety Guarantee: Built with multiple circuit protection (over-charging, short-circuit, high-temperature, and surge protection), and high-quality, fire-resistant construction.
Compatible with Nikon COOLPIX S60, S80, S200, S202, S203, S210, S220, S225, S230, S500, S510, S520, S570, S600, S700, S3000, S4000 and S5100 Digital Cameras.
We believe in our products. That's why we back them all with an 24 month warranty and provide friendly, easy-to-reach support.
description: Multi-protection, Safe and Reliable: The charger built-in smart PMC (protection management circuit) to prevent overcharge, over discharge, over voltage, high temperature and short circuit. Portable and compact: The charger is portable and lightweight. It was made with great workmanship, definitely your best choice of USB wall charger, car charger and Travel / External battery. Compatible with Nikon COOLPIX S60, S80, S200, S202, S203, S210, S220, S225, S230, S500, S510, S520, S570, S600, S700, S3000, S4000 and S5100 Digital Cameras. Note: 1. If you are not sure about compatibility, please contact our customer support for more information. What's In The Box: 1 x Camera Battery Charger
